// 01 · about

Who I Am

I'm Swasthik, a technical support engineer turned developer and Tech Support Specialist from Karkala, Karnataka. I hold a Bachelor of Computer Applications from Alvas College with a CGPA of 8.8 and have spent nearly 2 years solving real-world technical problems at UnifyCx (GlowTouch).

My daily work involved diagnosing database issues (MySQL, MSSQL), managing CMS platforms (WordPress, Joomla), and troubleshooting email systems (Office 365, G Suite). This gave me deep, hands-on exposure to the systems Python typically talks to.

I build with purpose — from a RFID-based smart door lock to a full-stack catering booking platform. I'm now channeling that into Python development, focusing on OOP, data structures, SQL-backed apps, and backend logic.

What I've Built

Web App
Career Craft — Placement Portal
Full-stack placement management website connecting students and recruiters. Features user authentication, job listings, application tracking, and admin dashboard built on OOP principles with normalized SQL schema.

🍽️
Web App
Cater Convex — Event Booking System
Web application for customers to browse, customize, and book food and event services. Implements queue-based order logic using data structures and real-time admin dashboard with SQL aggregation queries.
PHPMySQL HTMLData Structures GROUP BY
💬
Mobile
MyChatApp — Real-Time Chat
Android chat application with real-time messaging using Firebase. Built on strong OOP architecture — inheritance, polymorphism, abstraction — with Firebase handling authentication, live data sync, and cloud storage.
JavaFirebase OOPNoSQL Android
🔐
IoT · 🏆
Smart Door Lock — IoT System
RFID-based smart door lock built with Arduino. Programmed byte-level RFID data capture and processing logic in C++. Applied hardware interrupt handling and data validation — won 3rd Prize at Inter-College IoT Competition.
